TextView.android:text: Set up Strava API keys: create an API application at strava.com/settings/api (Authorization Callback Domain: rokidhud), then add strava.client.id and strava.client.secret to local.properties and rebuild.
Show miles & feet instead of km & meters
Use bottom 25% of the screen instead of full map

RadioButton.android:text: Strip — map across the bottom, directions below
Split — map on left, directions on right

TextView.android:text: P2P hotspot — no internet. Use Mobile Hotspot below for map tiles.
Turn on Mobile Hotspot in phone Settings \u2192 Network \u2192 Hotspot. Then enter its name and password here so glasses can load map tiles.

Button.android:text: Send to glasses \u2192 connect with internet

TextView.android:text: Send phone notifications to glasses when they arrive
Show large turn overlay when approaching a turn
Display current speed (mph or km/h based on units)
Display road speed limit (auto-detected, turns speed red if over)
Cache map tiles to disk for faster loading
